---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

A workshop scenario where the current app is awkward or insufficient. Be specific — "speeds up the gap-review step" beats "improves UX".

## Proposed solution

Sketch the feature shape. UI mockup if you have one.

## Alternatives considered

What did you think about that you rejected?

## Backlog placement

Which Bucket does this belong to? (See [HANDOFF.md](../../HANDOFF.md) §5.)
- [ ] Bucket A — finish AI platform
- [ ] Bucket B — Crown-jewel UX rework
- [ ] Bucket D — Deployment
- [ ] Bucket E — v3 multi-user
- [ ] New bucket (please describe)

## Two-surface treatment

If this involves a new data-model field, how would the demo session + seed skills exercise it? (Per [ADR-007 two-surface rule](../../docs/adr/ADR-007-skill-seed-demosession-separation.md).)

## Scope estimate

Rough — informs whether this fits a single tag (~3-4 hours), a phase (a day), or a major release (~weeks).

---

Before submitting:

- [ ] Searched existing issues + the [`docs/CHANGELOG_PLAN.md`](../../docs/CHANGELOG_PLAN.md) backlog; this isn't already queued.
- [ ] Read the relevant ADR if your idea touches an architectural decision.
- [ ] Considered whether this would violate any [INVARIANTS.md](../../INVARIANTS.md) entry.
